subject: chore(api): tripwire test + transport doc + small cleanups
body:
Wrap-up follow-ups to the previous commit:

- src/__tests__/apiRewrites.test.ts: 7 source-level assertions guarding
  the rewrite contract — proxy entries before SPA fallback, SPA regex
  excludes /api/, both configs point at tool-till-tees, API_BASE
  defaults to "". Catches a future revert silently re-breaking API
  routing at commit time, not after deploy.
- vite.config.ts: drop redundant `secure: true` (default for https targets).
- CLAUDE.md: AI Note documenting the same-origin → host-proxy transport
  model so future debugging of API failures starts with the right
  mental model.
- docs/TODO.md: fix stale `src/api/client.ts:23` line ref + correct
  header name (X-Dev-User-Id, not x-user-id).

Tags: testing, documentation, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-mobile-viewport
Semver: patch
